Arrived in Amsterdam for #KubeCon! Looking forward to seeing folks starting at Maintainer Summit on Sunday; who else will be here this week? (Also, enjoy a picture of a yummy galette from Cocotte, a delightful crêperie worth visiting if you’re here!)

Sunday morning 5km in Amsterdam, weather was nice today for a run.

Good start before kubecon, looking forward to spend next few days with the community 
#garmin #beatyesterday

The #PlatformEngineeringDay greatness at the #KubeCon #CloudNativeCon doesn't stop: now we got @hazelweakly.me talking about building extensible platforms!

Things usually go this way: Strong components → system → complexity → components → ... Is the cycle unavoidable?

I wish there were more "outsider guides" to technologies, that explained what it is for people who hear about it or are adjacent to it but don't need to use it. Like what is Kubernetes? What problems does it solve? What makes it a hard problem to solve? What are the legendary warts?

Sadly, I will not be at KubeCon this week. To show all my kubernaut friends just how much I miss you, I have a small gift.

If you missed out on getting a deck of Exploding Clusters cards, well now you can play online.

exploding.k8s.io

Go easy on me, it's just a "free time" project.

Have fun!

Kubernetes gets much easier to manage when Git becomes the source of truth for your deployments. Here, Olumoko shows you how to implement GitOps on Kubernetes with Argo CD + GitHub Actions. You'll learn how to automate stuff, deploy manifests from Git, & more.

gonna be hosteling around europe for a month after like the teenager i refuse to admit i'm not

As always, Rejekts was awesome. So nice to see old friends and to meet new ones!!

I cried. I laughed.
Monkigras (resilience theme, every talk hit). Paris with @betty now headed to KubeCon EU. FluxCon, KubeAuto Day, & a women's panel Wednesday at the AWS booth I'm really looking forward to.
It's been a hard season. This  community is why I'm here.

You don’t need to rewrite legacy Java apps to connect them to AI agents.

Use a Quarkus MCP server as a Kubernetes sidecar.

Same pod
Localhost communication
Zero changes to the legacy code

Clean architecture for AI-ready enterprise systems.

Any advice for a fourth-timer who is on their own for the first time?
Bureaucratic nonsense meant that I'll have to figure out how to conference on my own this year.

Come now thru 3pm! #kubecon

top_posts.text: Arrived in Amsterdam for #KubeCon #CloudNativeCon 🎉
👋 #KubeCon Amsterdam 🇳🇱
We're teeing up some fun for you at #KubeCon....

✈️ On my way to #KubeCon! 

Monday at #FluxCon we'll be launching the official #FluxCD Skills. I'll be taking about ADLC and how we've developed AI Agents specialised in GitOps and Flux security.

 If you are going to vibe code your Kubernetes infra, you should come to my talk on March 23 at 09AM 😊

It's almost time! On Monday, I'll be speaking with my friend @whitneylee.com at Platform Engineering Day in the context of KubeCon+CloudNativeCon Europe. I can't wait! We'll be talking about "Scaling on Satisfaction: Automated Rollouts Driven by User Feedback". #PlatEngDay #KubeCon sched.co/2DY2c

Kubernetes y/o Ray, Kafka, Spark, Nifi, Kubeflow, vLLM y MLFlow y no se necesita absolutamente nada más. 

Recurrir a tecnologías cerradas para ofrecer un servicio público es una completa incoherencia que nos está arrojando a un servilismo colonial

The end goal: make inference workloads a first class citizen in Kubernetes.

And for that,  LLM-d is joining the @cncf.io 🎉

Open Source for AI on stage here at #KubeCon #CloudNativeCon,  with llm-d.ai on stage sharing about the challenges of hosting LLMs

Inference Gateway provides LLM-aware routing answering the challenge already highlighted last year the traditional routing doesn't suit the statefulness nature of LLMs
llm-d is joining the #CNCF as Sandbox project! 🤩 #KubeCon

Paraphrasing something I heard at the opening #kubecon keynote:

Most hard problems can't be solved independently.

True for technology. True for humanity.

It's the first day of KubeCon and AI is yet everywhere.

Let's discover Llm-d a new project for inference distribution.
llm-d.ai
#KubeCon
Whooooose at Kubecon 👀👀

Llm-d now part of the CNCF 
A key project to allow AI to leverage the cloud-native ecosystem for scalable inference
#KubeCon

Day 0 was a whirlwind of innovation.

Co-located events and lightning talks showed a community moving fast, with cloud native AI, platform engineering, and observability taking center stage.

Day 1 starts now! Tot gauw!

#KubeCon #CloudNativeAI #OpenSource

Day 1 at KubeCon + CloudNativeCon was filled with great sessions from Wolfgang, Jamie & a fun Spec-tacular Game Show V2 with Alex & Tyler.

We are ready for Day 2! Stop by Booth 985 & catch today's sessions from Tyler Helmuth and Alex Boten.

Full agenda 👉 buff.ly/J1FlGoD

I’ve already been here for 3 days of conferences but the man event is finally kicking off this morning!

I can’t wait to see everyone! Come say hi and grab a selfie if you see me! 💙

What are y’all all looking forward to most?
